title: Manage Users
trigger: Admin accesses the user management dashboard

main_scenario.action: Admin views a list of all registered GM users
Admin selects a user and changes their status to Blocked or Active
System updates the user's access permissions immediately

exceptions.condition: Admin attempts to block themselves or the primary super-admin
exceptions.action: System prevents the action and displays an error

acceptance_criteria: All registered users are treated as GMs.
Admins can block or unblock users to control platform access.
A blocked user cannot log in or access their campaigns.
